title: Alpha Feedback
description: Single-scene alpha clarity feedback with rolling theta and beta inhibits.

clarity_at_threshold.label: Threshold clarity
clarity_at_threshold.description: Clarity value at the reward threshold.

reward_target_pct.label: Reward rate
reward_target_pct.description: Target percentage of samples expected to reward.

theta_inhibit_pct.label: Theta inhibit
theta_inhibit_pct.description: Target percentage of theta samples expected to inhibit.

beta_inhibit_pct.label: Beta inhibit
beta_inhibit_pct.description: Target percentage of beta samples expected to inhibit.
